title: Execution Timer Context Manager
description: Implement a context manager 'TaskTimer' using the 'with' statement. It should record the start time on entry and set 'self.duration' on exit. If an exception occurs, it should still calculate the duration before re-raising.
test_script:
import unittest, time
from timer import TaskTimer
class TestTimer(unittest.TestCase):
    def test_duration(self):
        with TaskTimer() as t:
            time.sleep(0.1)
        self.assertGreaterEqual(t.duration, 0.1)
